sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Player position: {node['boundary']}")

dots = []
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] <= 4 and node['color'] != 'W':
        dots.append({'color': node['color'], 'pos': node['boundary'][0]})
print(f"Dots: {dots}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
